---
name: Spike / Investigation
about: Time-boxed research or technical investigation
labels: spike
---

## Question

<!-- What are we trying to answer or learn? -->

## Context

<!-- Why do we need to investigate this now? What decision does it unblock? -->

## Time Box

<!-- How much time should be spent? e.g., 2 hours, 1 day -->

## Expected Output

<!-- What deliverable is expected? e.g., ADR, proof of concept, written recommendation -->

## Constraints

<!-- Any constraints on the solution space? e.g., must work with existing infra, budget limits -->
